name: SyncView Calendar — Get

parameters.content:
## SyncView Calendar — Get

GET /webhook/calendar-get?client=<slug>

Reads the `Calendar_<slug>` tab on the **SyncView Calendar** Sheet (id `1Gsn5xLImJyMhBMCNjK_tigpoUfcSFnvxTQLkk-A9Yps`) and returns `{ok, posts:[…]}` sorted by order_index. Powers the Organizer/Month/Week views in index.html.
